user.title: Too Good To Go – Login
user.description: Enter your Too Good To Go email address. You will receive a magic link email from TGTG.

login.title: Confirm Login
login.description:
A login email has been sent to **{email}**.

Open the email from Too Good To Go and click the login link. Then come back here and press 'Submit'.

options.title: Options
options.description: Choose how often to update Too Good To Go data.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please try again – make sure to click the link in the login email first.

abort.already_configured: Too Good To Go is already configured with this email.
